Personal Project · Data Analysis

Fitness Analytics

Years of personal training history extracted from Google Calendar exports, parsed through a custom classifier, and visualised to surface patterns in consistency, seasonality and training focus.

Total sessions
2020–2026

Cardio
Most trained

The Journey

Cumulative session count from June 2020. Milestone markers at 100, 250, 500, 750 and 1,000 sessions.

Consistency

Weekly session count (bars) with 4-week rolling average (line). Shows periods of high output and off-seasons.

Training Focus

Total sessions per muscle group across the full dataset.

Training balance — a more even polygon indicates balanced coverage across muscle groups.

Year by Year

Sessions per year with year-over-year % change annotated.

Monthly training heatmap — rows are years, columns are months. Reveals seasonal dips and peaks.

Activity Calendar

GitHub-style activity calendar. Each row is a year, each column a week of the year. Darker = more sessions that week.

Cardio Breakdown

Cardio sessions by type and month. Running peaks in summer (Jul–Sep), football peaks in winter (Jan–Feb), consistent with indoor league seasons.

Generated 25 March 2026  ·  Data source: Google Calendar export  ·  Built with Python, Pandas & Plotly
